user.title: Heiko / Neoheat Heat Pump
user.description: Connect to your USR-W600 WiFi-to-RS-485 bridge. All communication stays on your local network — no cloud required.

data.mn: Unit MN / MAC address (12 hex chars, e.g. A1B2C3D4E5F6)
data.flow_rate_lps: Water flow rate (L/s) — from manual: Eko II 6=0.29, 9=0.43, 12=0.57, 15=0.714, 19=0.92

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the bridge at the given host and port. Check the IP address, port, and your network.
error.invalid_mn: MN must be exactly 12 hex characters (6 bytes), e.g. A1B2C3D4E5F6 or F4:70:0C:77:F0:1A.

abort.already_configured: This heat pump (MN) is already configured.
